name: Potted White Tulip
description: A white tulip displayed in a flower pot. Purely decorative.

description: A wither rose displayed in a flower pot. Does not apply the Wither effect.

name: Powder Snow

name: Prismarine Brick Stairs

name: Purple Bed

name: Purple Candle

name: Purple Candle Cake

name: Purple Carpet
description: A thin purple-dyed decorative block. Can be placed on most surfaces.

name: Purple Glazed Terracotta

name: Purple Shulker Box

name: Purple Stained Glass

name: Purple Stained Glass Pane

name: Purple Terracotta
description: A purple-dyed hardened clay block. Used for building and decoration.

name: Purple Wall Banner
description: Wall-mounted variant of the purple banner. Can be customized with patterns.

name: Purple Wool

description: A purple building block found in End cities and End ships.

name: Purpur Stairs

name: Quartz Bricks

name: Quartz Pillar

name: Quartz Slab
description: A half-height slab cut from quartz blocks.

name: Quartz Stairs
description: Stair-shaped block cut from quartz blocks. Used for vertical movement and decoration.

name: Raw Gold Block
description: A storage block crafted from 9 raw gold. Can be smelted into gold ingots.

name: Raw Iron Block
description: A storage block crafted from 9 raw iron. Can be smelted into iron ingots.

name: Red Banner
description: A tall decorative block dyed red. Can be customized with patterns using a loom.

name: Red Bed
description: A red-dyed bed. The default bed color. Sets the player's spawn point when slept in at night.

name: Red Candle
description: A red-dyed candle. Up to 4 can be placed on one block, increasing light level.

name: Red Candle Cake
description: A cake with a red candle on top. The candle can be lit and emits light.

name: Red Carpet
description: A thin red-dyed decorative block. Can be placed on most surfaces.

name: Red Concrete
description: A solid red building block. Formed when red concrete powder contacts water.

name: Red Concrete Powder
description: A gravity-affected block that turns into red concrete when it touches water.

name: Red Glazed Terracotta
description: A decorative red glazed block with a colorful pattern. Can create larger designs when rotated.

name: Red Mushroom
description: A small red mushroom that grows in dark areas. Used in crafting mushroom stew.

name: Red Mushroom Block
description: The cap block of a huge red mushroom. Can drop mushrooms when mined.

name: Red Nether Brick Slab
description: A half-height slab cut from red nether bricks.

name: Red Nether Brick Stairs
description: Stair-shaped block cut from red nether bricks. Used for vertical movement and decoration.

name: Red Nether Brick Wall
description: A decorative wall made from red nether bricks. Connects to adjacent walls and blocks.

name: Red Nether Bricks
description: A red variant of nether bricks crafted from nether wart and nether brick items.

name: Red Sand
description: A gravity-affected red sand block found in badlands biomes. Used to craft red sandstone.

name: Red Sandstone
description: A building block crafted from red sand. Found naturally in badlands biomes.

name: Red Sandstone Slab
description: A half-height slab cut from red sandstone.

name: Red Sandstone Stairs
description: Stair-shaped block cut from red sandstone. Used for vertical movement and decoration.

name: Red Sandstone Wall
description: A decorative wall made from red sandstone. Connects to adjacent walls and blocks.

name: Red Shulker Box
description: A red-dyed portable storage container with 27 slots that retains contents when broken.

name: Red Stained Glass
description: A transparent red-tinted glass block. Does not drop itself without Silk Touch.

name: Red Stained Glass Pane
description: A thin red-tinted glass panel. Connects to adjacent panes and blocks.

name: Red Terracotta
description: A red-dyed hardened clay block. Used for building and decoration.

name: Red Tulip
description: A red flower found in plains and flower forests. Can be crafted into red dye.

name: Red Wall Banner
description: Wall-mounted variant of the red banner. Can be customized with patterns.

name: Red Wool
description: A red-dyed wool block. Flammable, used for crafting beds, banners, and carpets.

name: Block of Redstone
description: A solid block that provides a constant redstone signal of 15 to adjacent components.

name: Redstone Lamp
description: Emits light when powered by a redstone signal.

name: Redstone Ore
description: Ore that drops redstone dust when mined. Lights up briefly when touched or struck.

description: Provides a constant redstone signal of 15 unless the block it's attached to is powered.

name: Redstone Wall Torch
description: Wall-mounted variant of redstone torch. Provides a signal unless its support block is powered.

name: Redstone Wire
description: Transmits redstone power along the ground, losing 1 signal strength per block traveled.

name: Reinforced Deepslate
description: An extremely hard block found in ancient cities. Cannot be mined or moved by pistons.

name: Redstone Repeater
description: Delays a redstone signal by 1-4 ticks and acts as a one-way repeater to extend signal range.

name: Repeating Command Block
description: Continuously executes its command every game tick while powered. Only obtainable with commands.

name: Block of Resin
description: A decorative orange block made from resin clumps. Has a semi-transparent appearance.

name: Resin Brick Slab
description: A half-height slab cut from resin bricks.

name: Resin Brick Stairs
description: Stair-shaped block cut from resin bricks. Used for vertical movement and decoration.

name: Resin Brick Wall
description: A decorative wall made from resin bricks. Connects to adjacent walls and blocks.

name: Resin Bricks

name: Respawn Anchor
description: Sets the player's spawn point in the Nether. Charged with glowstone, up to 4 charges.

name: Rooted Dirt
description: Dirt with roots growing through it. Found below azalea trees above lush caves. Hanging roots grow from it.

name: Rose Bush
description: A two-block tall red flower found in forests. Can be crafted into red dye.

name: Sand
description: A gravity-affected block found in deserts, beaches, and rivers. Used to craft sandstone and glass.

name: Sandstone
description: A building block crafted from sand. Forms naturally at the bottom of sand deposits.

name: Sandstone Slab
description: A half-height slab cut from sandstone.

name: Sandstone Stairs
description: Stair-shaped block cut from sandstone. Used for vertical movement and decoration.

name: Sandstone Wall
description: A decorative wall made from sandstone. Connects to adjacent walls and blocks.

name: Scaffolding
description: A climbable temporary structure that falls if not supported. Can extend up to 6 blocks horizontally.

name: Sculk
description: A block that spreads from sculk catalysts when a mob dies nearby. Drops experience when mined.

name: Sculk Catalyst
description: Spreads sculk blocks when a mob dies within 8 blocks. Stores experience in sculk veins.

name: Sculk Sensor
description: Detects vibrations like footsteps, block placement, and projectiles, and emits a redstone signal.

name: Sculk Shrieker
description: Produces a shrieking sound and applies Darkness when activated. Can summon the Warden after four activations.

name: Sculk Vein
description: Thin sculk growth that spreads on block surfaces from sculk catalysts.

name: Sea Lantern
description: An underwater light source with light level 15. Drops prismarine crystals when mined.

name: Sea Pickle
description: A small underwater organism that emits light. Up to 4 can be placed on one block.

name: Seagrass
description: A short underwater plant that generates on the ocean floor. Drops nothing when broken.

name: Short Dry Grass
description: Short dried grass found in arid biomes. Purely decorative ground cover.

name: Short Grass
description: Common ground cover found in most grassy biomes. Drops wheat seeds when broken.

name: Shroomlight
description: A bright light source found on huge fungi in the Nether. Emits light level 15.

name: Shulker Box
description: A portable storage container with 27 slots that retains its contents when broken.

name: Skeleton Skull
description: A decorative mob head. Wearing it reduces the detection range of skeletons by 50%.

name: Skeleton Wall Skull
description: Wall-mounted variant of the skeleton skull. Wearing it reduces skeleton detection range by 50%.

name: Slime Block
description: Bounces entities that land on it. Sticks to adjacent blocks when pushed by pistons.

name: Small Amethyst Bud
description: The first growth stage of an amethyst bud. Does not drop anything when mined without Silk Touch.

name: Small Dripleaf
description: A decorative plant that can only be placed on clay, moss, or in water. Grows into big dripleaf with bone meal.

name: Smithing Table
description: Used to upgrade diamond gear to netherite and apply armor trim templates. Serves as a toolsmith's job site block.

name: Smoker
description: Cooks food items at twice the speed of a regular furnace. Serves as a butcher's job site block.

name: Smooth Basalt
description: A smooth variant of basalt found in the outer layer of amethyst geodes.

name: Smooth Quartz
description: A smooth variant of quartz blocks. Created by smelting quartz blocks in a furnace.

name: Smooth Quartz Slab
description: A half-height slab cut from smooth quartz.

name: Smooth Quartz Stairs
description: Stair-shaped block cut from smooth quartz. Used for vertical movement and decoration.

name: Smooth Red Sandstone

name: Smooth Red Sandstone Slab
description: A half-height slab cut from smooth red sandstone.

name: Smooth Red Sandstone Stairs
description: Stair-shaped block cut from smooth red sandstone. Used for vertical movement and decoration.

name: Smooth Sandstone
description: A smooth variant of sandstone. Created by smelting sandstone in a furnace.

name: Smooth Sandstone Slab
description: A half-height slab cut from smooth sandstone.

name: Smooth Sandstone Stairs
description: Stair-shaped block cut from smooth sandstone. Used for vertical movement and decoration.

description: A half-height slab cut from smooth stone. Has clean, flat surfaces.

name: Snow Block
description: A solid block of packed snow. Does not melt from light but is destroyed by flowing water.

name: Soul Campfire

name: Soul Fire
description: Blue fire found on soul sand or soul soil. Deals twice the damage of regular fire and repels piglins.

name: Soul Lantern
description: A dimmer lantern variant with a blue flame. Emits light level 10 and repels piglins.

name: Soul Sand
description: Slows entity movement, creates upward bubble columns in water, and is used to grow nether wart.

name: Soul Soil
description: Found in soul sand valleys. Does not slow movement but produces soul fire when ignited.

name: Soul Torch
description: A torch with a blue soul flame. Emits light level 10 and repels piglins.

name: Soul Wall Torch
description: Wall-mounted variant of the soul torch. Emits light level 10 and repels piglins.

name: Sponge
description: Absorbs water in a 7-block radius when placed, becoming a wet sponge.

name: Spruce Door

name: Spruce Fence

name: Spruce Fence Gate

name: Spruce Hanging Sign

name: Spruce Sign

name: Spruce Slab

name: Spruce Stairs
description: Stair-shaped block crafted from spruce planks. Used for compact vertical movement and decoration.

name: Spruce Trapdoor
description: A trapdoor crafted from spruce planks. Can be opened by hand or with a redstone signal.

name: Spruce Wall Hanging Sign
description: Wall-mounted variant of the spruce hanging sign. Displays custom text.

name: Spruce Wall Sign
description: Wall-mounted variant of the spruce sign. Displays up to four lines of custom text.

name: Spruce Wood

name: Sticky Piston
description: Pushes and pulls up to 12 blocks when powered by redstone.

name: Stone

name: Stone Brick Slab

name: Stone Brick Stairs

name: Stone Brick Wall

name: Stone Bricks

name: Stone Pressure Plate
description: Activates only when a player or mob stands on it, ignoring dropped items.

name: Stone Slab
description: A half-height slab cut from stone. Can be placed on top or bottom of a block, or stacked.

name: Stone Stairs
description: Stair-shaped block cut from stone. Used for vertical movement and decoration.

description: Cuts stone-type blocks into slabs, stairs, and other variants more efficiently than crafting.

name: Stripped Acacia Wood
description: Acacia wood with bark removed on all six faces. Has a smooth, light appearance.

name: Stripped Bamboo Block

name: Stripped Birch Log
description: A birch log with its bark removed by an axe. Has a lighter exposed interior.

name: Stripped Birch Wood
description: Birch wood with bark removed on all six faces. Has a smooth, light appearance.

name: Stripped Cherry Log
description: A cherry log with its bark removed by an axe. Has a lighter pink exposed interior.

name: Stripped Cherry Wood
description: Cherry wood with bark removed on all six faces. Has a smooth pink appearance.

name: Stripped Crimson Hyphae
description: Crimson hyphae with its outer layer removed by an axe. Fireproof.

name: Stripped Crimson Stem
description: A crimson stem with its outer layer removed by an axe. Fireproof.

name: Stripped Dark Oak Log
description: A dark oak log with its bark removed by an axe. Has a lighter exposed interior.

name: Stripped Dark Oak Wood
description: Dark oak wood with bark removed on all six faces. Has a smooth, light appearance.

name: Stripped Jungle Log
description: A jungle log with its bark removed by an axe. Has a lighter exposed interior.

name: Stripped Jungle Wood
description: Jungle wood with bark removed on all six faces. Has a smooth, light appearance.

name: Stripped Mangrove Log
description: A mangrove log with its bark removed by an axe. Has a reddish exposed interior.

name: Stripped Mangrove Wood
description: Mangrove wood with bark removed on all six faces. Has a smooth reddish appearance.

name: Stripped Oak Log
description: An oak log with its bark removed by an axe. Has a lighter exposed interior.

name: Stripped Oak Wood
description: Oak wood with bark removed on all six faces. Has a smooth, light appearance.

name: Stripped Pale Oak Wood
description: Pale oak wood with bark removed on all six faces. Has a smooth pale appearance.

name: Stripped Spruce Log
description: A spruce log with its bark removed by an axe. Has a lighter exposed interior.

name: Stripped Spruce Wood
description: Spruce wood with bark removed on all six faces. Has a smooth, light appearance.

name: Stripped Warped Hyphae
description: Warped hyphae with its outer layer removed by an axe. Fireproof.

name: Stripped Warped Stem
description: A warped stem with its outer layer removed by an axe. Fireproof.

name: Structure Block
description: Used to save and load structures. Only obtainable with commands.

name: Structure Void
description: Prevents blocks from being overwritten when loading structures. Only obtainable with commands.

name: Sugar Cane
description: Grows up to 3 blocks tall near water. Used to craft paper and sugar.

name: Sunflower
description: A two-block tall yellow flower that always faces east. Can be crafted into yellow dye.

name: Suspicious Gravel
description: Contains hidden items that can be extracted with a brush. Found in certain structures.

name: Suspicious Sand
description: Contains hidden items that can be extracted with a brush. Found in desert temples and other structures.

name: Sweet Berry Bush
description: A thorny bush that damages and slows entities. Produces sweet berries when fully grown.

name: Tall Dry Grass
description: A two-block tall dried grass found in arid biomes. Purely decorative.

name: Tall Grass
description: A two-block tall grass found in most grassy biomes. Drops wheat seeds when broken.

name: Tall Seagrass
description: A two-block tall underwater plant. Generated when seagrass is bone-mealed.

name: Terracotta
description: Undyed hardened clay block. Found naturally in badlands biomes. Can be dyed 16 colors.

name: Test Block
description: A technical block used for game testing. Only obtainable with commands.

name: Test Instance Block
description: A technical block used for running game tests. Only obtainable with commands.

description: A dark glass that blocks light but is visually transparent. Drops itself without Silk Touch.

name: TNT
description: Explosive block that detonates when ignited by fire, redstone, or projectiles.

name: Torch
description: A common light source that emits light level 14. Can be placed on floors or walls.

name: Torchflower
description: A decorative flower grown from torchflower seeds on farmland.

name: Torchflower Crop
description: A crop that grows from torchflower seeds planted on farmland.

name: Trapped Chest
description: Functions like a chest but emits a redstone signal proportional to the number of players viewing it.

name: Trial Spawner
description: Found in trial chambers. Spawns mobs based on the number of nearby players and ejects rewards when complete.

name: Tripwire
description: Connects between tripwire hooks to detect entities passing through.

name: Tripwire Hook
description: Emits a redstone signal when its connected tripwire string is triggered by an entity.

name: Tube Coral
description: A blue coral found in warm ocean biomes. Dies and turns gray if removed from water.

name: Tube Coral Block
description: A solid coral block found in warm ocean biomes. Dies and turns into a dead coral block without water.

name: Tube Coral Fan
description: A flat coral fan found in warm ocean biomes. Dies and turns gray if removed from water.

name: Tube Coral Wall Fan
description: A wall-mounted coral fan found in warm ocean biomes. Dies without adjacent water.

name: Tuff
description: A volcanic stone that generates in the Overworld at low Y levels. Used as a building material.

name: Tuff Brick Slab
description: A half-height slab cut from tuff bricks. Can be placed on top or bottom of a block, or stacked.

name: Tuff Brick Stairs
description: Stair-shaped block cut from tuff bricks. Used for vertical movement and decoration.

name: Tuff Brick Wall
description: A decorative wall made from tuff bricks. Connects to adjacent walls and blocks.

name: Tuff Bricks
description: A bricked variant of tuff. Crafted from polished tuff or via stonecutter.

name: Tuff Slab
description: A half-height slab cut from tuff. Can be placed on top or bottom of a block, or stacked.

name: Tuff Stairs
description: Stair-shaped block cut from tuff. Used for vertical movement and decoration.

name: Tuff Wall
description: A decorative wall made from tuff. Connects to adjacent walls and blocks.

name: Turtle Egg
description: Hatches into baby turtles at night. Zombies and other mobs try to trample and break them.

name: Twisting Vines
description: Grows upward in warped forests. Climbable and can be grown with bone meal.

name: Twisting Vines Plant
description: The body segment of twisting vines below the growing tip.

name: Vault
description: Found in trial chambers. Each player can unlock it once using a trial key to receive loot.

name: Verdant Froglight
description: A green light block produced when a frog eats a small magma cube. Emits light level 15.

name: Vine
description: Climbable plant that grows downward on blocks. Found in jungles and swamp tree canopies.

name: Void Air
description: Fills empty space above Y=319 and below Y=-64.

name: Wall Torch
description: A torch mounted on a wall. Emits light level 14. Breaks if the supporting block is removed.

name: Warped Button
description: A button made from warped planks. Emits a short redstone pulse when pressed. Fireproof.

name: Warped Door
description: A door crafted from warped planks. Can be opened by hand or with a redstone signal. Fireproof.

name: Warped Fence
description: A fence crafted from warped planks. Connects to adjacent fences and blocks. Fireproof.

name: Warped Fence Gate
description: A gate crafted from warped planks. Can be opened by hand or with a redstone signal. Fireproof.

name: Warped Fungus
description: A mushroom-like plant found in warped forests. Can be grown into a huge fungus with bone meal on nylium.

name: Warped Hanging Sign
description: A sign that hangs from blocks or chains, made from warped planks. Fireproof.

name: Warped Hyphae
description: A stem block with bark on all six faces, made from warped stems. Used for building. Fireproof.

name: Warped Nylium
description: The surface block of warped forests in the Nether. Warped fungi and roots can grow on it.

name: Warped Planks
description: Planks crafted from warped stems. Used in building and crafting. Fireproof.

name: Warped Pressure Plate
description: A pressure plate made from warped planks. Activates when any entity steps on it. Fireproof.

name: Warped Roots
description: A small cyan plant found in warped forests. Used for decoration.

name: Warped Shelf
description: A decorative shelf block made from warped planks. Can store and display items. Fireproof.

name: Warped Sign
description: A sign crafted from warped planks. Displays up to four lines of custom text. Fireproof.

name: Warped Slab
description: A half-height block crafted from warped planks. Can be placed on top or bottom of a block. Fireproof.

name: Warped Stairs
description: Stair-shaped block crafted from warped planks. Used for vertical movement and decoration. Fireproof.

name: Warped Stem
description: The trunk block of huge warped fungi. Can be stripped with an axe or crafted into planks. Fireproof.

name: Warped Trapdoor
description: A trapdoor crafted from warped planks. Can be opened by hand or with a redstone signal. Fireproof.

name: Warped Wall Hanging Sign
description: Wall-mounted variant of the warped hanging sign. Fireproof.

name: Warped Wall Sign
description: Wall-mounted variant of the warped sign. Displays custom text. Fireproof.

name: Warped Wart Block
description: A cyan decorative block found on huge warped fungi. Cannot be crafted from warped roots.

name: Water

name: Water Cauldron
description: A cauldron filled with water. Can be used to wash dyed items or fill water bottles.

name: Waxed Chiseled Copper
description: A waxed chiseled copper block that will not oxidize further. Apply honeycomb to preserve the look.

name: Waxed Copper Bars
description: Waxed copper bars that will not oxidize further. Preserves the original copper appearance.

name: Waxed Block of Copper
description: A waxed copper block that will not oxidize further. Preserves the original orange color.

name: Waxed Copper Bulb
description: A waxed copper bulb that will not oxidize further. Maintains its current light output.

name: Waxed Copper Chain
description: A waxed copper chain that will not oxidize further. Preserves the original appearance.

name: Waxed Copper Chest
description: A waxed copper chest that will not oxidize further. Preserves the original appearance.

name: White Banner
description: A tall decorative block dyed white. Can be customized with patterns using a loom.

name: White Bed
description: A white-dyed bed. Sets the player's spawn point when slept in at night.

name: White Candle
description: A white-dyed candle. Up to 4 can be placed on one block, increasing light level.

name: White Candle Cake
description: A cake with a white candle on top. The candle can be lit and emits light.

name: White Carpet
description: A thin white-dyed decorative block. Can be placed on most surfaces.

name: White Concrete
description: A solid white building block. Formed when white concrete powder contacts water.

name: White Concrete Powder
description: A gravity-affected block that turns into white concrete when it touches water.

name: White Glazed Terracotta
description: A decorative white glazed block with a colorful pattern. Can create larger designs when rotated.

name: White Shulker Box
description: A white-dyed portable storage container with 27 slots that retains contents when broken.

name: White Stained Glass
description: A transparent white-tinted glass block. Does not drop itself without Silk Touch.

name: White Stained Glass Pane
description: A thin white-tinted glass panel. Connects to adjacent panes and blocks.

name: White Terracotta
description: A white-dyed hardened clay block. Used for building and decoration.

name: White Wool

name: Wildflowers

name: Wither Skeleton Skull

name: Wither Skeleton Wall Skull
